endpoints.name: GET /accounts/{account_id}/env
endpoints.description: Returns all environment variables for an account or site. An account corresponds to a team in the Netlify UI. To use this endpoint, your site must no longer be using the classic environment variables experience. Migrate now with the Netlify UI.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{NETLIFY_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your NETLIFY ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{ACCOUNT_ID}} with a real account_id.

endpoints.name: POST /accounts/{account_id}/env
endpoints.description: Creates new environment variables. Granular scopes are available on Pro plans and above. To use this endpoint, your site must no longer be using the classic environment variables experience. Migrate now with the Netlify UI.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{NETLIFY_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your NETLIFY ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{ACCOUNT_ID}} with a real account_id.

endpoints.name: GET /accounts/{account_id}/env/{key}
endpoints.description: Returns an individual environment variable. To use this endpoint, your site must no longer be using the classic environment variables experience. Migrate now with the Netlify UI.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{NETLIFY_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your NETLIFY ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{KEY}} with a real key. Replace {{ACCOUNT_ID}} with a real account_id.

endpoints.name: PUT /accounts/{account_id}/env/{key}
endpoints.description: Updates an existing environment variable and all of its values. Existing values will be replaced by values provided. To use this endpoint, your site must no longer be using the classic environment variables experience. Migrate now with the Netlify UI.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{NETLIFY_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your NETLIFY ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{KEY}} with a real key. Replace {{ACCOUNT_ID}} with a real account_id.

endpoints.name: DELETE /accounts/{account_id}/env/{key}
endpoints.description: Deletes an environment variable. To use this endpoint, your site must no longer be using the classic environment variables experience. Migrate now with the Netlify UI.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{NETLIFY_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your NETLIFY ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{KEY}} with a real key. Replace {{ACCOUNT_ID}} with a real account_id.

endpoints.name: PATCH /accounts/{account_id}/env/{key}
endpoints.description: Updates or creates a new value for an existing environment variable. To use this endpoint, your site must no longer be using the classic environment variables experience. Migrate now with the Netlify UI.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{NETLIFY_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your NETLIFY ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{KEY}} with a real key. Replace {{ACCOUNT_ID}} with a real account_id.

endpoints.name: DELETE /accounts/{account_id}/env/{key}/value/{id}
endpoints.description: Deletes a specific environment variable value. To use this endpoint, your site must no longer be using the classic environment variables experience. Migrate now with the Netlify UI.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{NETLIFY_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your NETLIFY ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{ID}} with a real id. Replace {{KEY}} with a real key. Replace {{ACCOUNT_ID}} with a real account_id.

endpoints.name: PUT /sites/{site_id}/unlink_repo
endpoints.description:
[Beta] Unlinks the repo from the site.

This action will also:
- Delete associated deploy keys
- Delete outgoing webhooks for the repo
- Delete the site's build hooks
endpoints.notes: Replace {{NETLIFY_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your NETLIFY ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SITE_ID}} with a real site_id.
